title: erigeron nanus subsp. neglectus
intro: Erigeron nanus subsp. neglectus, also known as Dwarf Fleabane or Alpine Daisy, is a perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the western United States and Canada. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and has been used in herbal remedies to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Erigeron nanus subsp. neglectus include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the flowers and leaves in hot water or oil, and are commonly used in teas, salves, and topical creams.
